历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, science ranking approximately 17876 → 2022 approximately 18204 → 2023 approximately 44546 (abnormal gap year) → 2024 approximately 23524 → 2025 physics category approximately 27611. After a significant gap in 2023, there was a clear recovery in 2024. In 2025, it shifted back by about 4087 positions compared to 2024, showing a backward trend in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 27611. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 2021: 70 → 2022: 73 → 2023: 77 → 2024: 77 → 2025: 77 → 2026: 85. In 2026, there is an expansion of 8 students (about 10.4%) compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition, but must be assessed in combination with changes in the number of candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026, showing a continuous upward trend in recent years, with the university's comprehensive strength and recognition on the rise. In 2025, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to employment data attracting attention. Douyin heat total ranking 62nd, rated as average, with overall moderate to low popularity. No obvious enrollment gap records. Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, which have certain associations with statistics, ecology (environmental science and engineering category), and biological sciences in the physics category enrollment majors, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication and other science and engineering majors are highly popular and recommended. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from approximately 172,468 in 2025, leading to a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province, with Shaanxi candidates applying across provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%-1.8%, belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 27611, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.4% but the physics category candidate pool expanding by about 19.7% (candidate growth far exceeding enrollment expansion), and the continuous rise in the university's ranking, competition is expected to intensify overall. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29532, with a range of 29032-30032.
